scripts.login:dev: cross-env test_env=dev npx playwright test --headed tests/UI/login.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.dashboard:dev: cross-env test_env=dev npx playwright test --headed tests/UI/dashboard.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.transactions:dev: cross-env test_env=dev npx playwright test --headed tests/UI/transactions.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.clean:screenshots: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const screenshotsDir = path.join(__dirname, 'screenshots'); if (fs.existsSync(screenshotsDir)) { fs.rmSync(screenshotsDir, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync(screenshotsDir); console.log('🗑️  Screenshots directory cleaned'); } else { console.log('📁 Screenshots directory does not exist'); }"
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:screenshots && rimraf test-results playwright-report
scripts.run:smoke-from-login: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run smoke tests from login spec"
scripts.run:smoke-from-dashboard: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run smoke tests from dashboard spec"
scripts.run:smoke-from-transactions: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run smoke tests from transactions spec"
scripts.run:regression-and-smoke-from-dashboard: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run regression and smoke tests from dashboard spec"
scripts.run:smoke-headed: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run smoke tests in headed mode"
scripts.run:all-tests-debug: ts-node test-runner/testRunner.ts "run all tests in debug mode"

scriptsDescription.test: Run all Playwright tests in headless mode across all browsers
scriptsDescription.smoke: Run smoke tests (critical path tests) in headless mode - fast validation of core functionality
scriptsDescription.smoke:headed: Run smoke tests with browser visible - useful for debugging smoke test failures
scriptsDescription.smoke:dev: Run smoke tests in DEV environment with headed Chromium browser
scriptsDescription.regression: Run full regression test suite in headless mode - comprehensive test coverage
scriptsDescription.regression:headed: Run regression tests with browser visible - useful for debugging regression failures
scriptsDescription.regression:dev: Run regression tests in DEV environment with headed Chromium browser
scriptsDescription.login: Run login test suite in headless mode (default browser)
scriptsDescription.login:dev: Run login tests in DEV environment with headed Chromium browser (visible UI)
scriptsDescription.login:headed: Run login tests with browser visible (headed mode) - useful for debugging
scriptsDescription.login:debug: Run login tests in debug mode with Playwright Inspector - step through tests line by line
scriptsDescription.dashboard: Run dashboard account management test suite in headless mode (default browser)
scriptsDescription.dashboard:dev: Run dashboard tests in DEV environment with headed Chromium browser (visible UI)
scriptsDescription.dashboard:headed: Run dashboard tests with browser visible (headed mode) - useful for debugging
scriptsDescription.dashboard:debug: Run dashboard tests in debug mode with Playwright Inspector - step through tests line by line
scriptsDescription.transactions: Run transactions test suite in headless mode (default browser)
scriptsDescription.transactions:dev: Run transactions tests in DEV environment with headed Chromium browser (visible UI)
scriptsDescription.transactions:headed: Run transactions tests with browser visible (headed mode) - useful for debugging
scriptsDescription.transactions:debug: Run transactions tests in debug mode with Playwright Inspector - step through tests line by line
scriptsDescription.clean:screenshots: Remove all captured screenshots from the screenshots directory - useful for cleanup before new test runs
scriptsDescription.clean:all: Clean all test artifacts including screenshots, test results, and HTML reports
scriptsDescription.pretest: Pre-test hook that runs before test execution - displays start message
